---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for OpenClaw Guided Install
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: bobrapp
---

## Problem Statement

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve. Example: "When deploying to Fly.io, there is no way to configure the region during the wizard — I have to edit the config manually."

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen. Include as much detail as you can about the user experience, API shape, or configuration format.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered, and why the proposed solution is preferable.

## Host Targets Affected

Which host targets does this feature apply to?

- [ ] macOS (Local)
- [ ] DigitalOcean
- [ ] Azure VM
- [ ] Generic VPS
- [ ] Railway
- [ ] Render
- [ ] Fly.io
- [ ] Hetzner Cloud
- [ ] Oracle Cloud
- [ ] OVHcloud
- [ ] Tencent Cloud Lighthouse
- [ ] Alibaba Cloud ECS
- [ ] Vultr Cloud
- [ ] Kamatera
- [ ] All hosts
- [ ] Not host-specific

## Scope

Which area of the project does this affect?

- [ ] Web UI (React frontend)
- [ ] Backend API (Express server)
- [ ] Installation wizard (steps/flow)
- [ ] Installation scripts (shell)
- [ ] Marketplace entries
- [ ] Audit logging / governance
- [ ] CI/CD workflows
- [ ] Internationalization (i18n)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other: _______________

## Is This a Significant Change?

Per [GOVERNANCE.md](../../GOVERNANCE.md), significant changes (architecture, new dependencies, data model changes) require an RFC Discussion and co-founder approval.

- [ ] No — this is a minor feature or improvement
- [ ] Yes — this involves architecture, new dependencies, or data model changes (please open a Discussion first)

## Additional Context

Add any mockups, screenshots, references, or prior art that help explain your request. Links to similar implementations in other projects are welcome.
